title: Rat-gate
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Rat}}
'''Rat-gates''' were [[Force field/Legends|forcefields]] installed in [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] sewers that zapped any living thing that passed through it.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' novel]]

[[Category:Force field technology]]
[[Category:Security technology]]
